title.zh: 中国储能电池系统进入突尼斯：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國儲能電池系統進入突尼西亞：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China battery energy storage system documentation against Tunisia INNORPI standards practice, STEG / ANME grid and renewable-energy project expectations, UN 38.3 transport, fire-safety, and 50 Hz electrical requirements.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国储能电池系统文件与突尼斯INNORPI标准实践、STEG/ANME电网和可再生能源项目要求、UN 38.3运输、消防安全及50Hz电气要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國儲能電池系統文件與突尼西亞INNORPI標準實務、STEG/ANME電網和再生能源項目要求、UN 38.3運輸、消防安全及50Hz電氣要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, INNORPI scope determination, customs decision, STEG grid-connection approval, ANME project approval, fire-safety approval, dangerous-goods classification, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, designers, and installers should verify current Tunisia standards, import, grid, fire, transport, and project requirements with qualified local professionals before shipment or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、INNORPI适用范围裁定、海关决定、STEG并网批准、ANME项目批准、消防安全批准、危险货物分类或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、设计方和安装方在出货或安装前应与合格当地专业人士核验现行突尼斯标准、进口、电网、消防、运输及项目要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、INNORPI適用範圍裁定、海關決定、STEG併網批准、ANME項目批准、消防安全批准、危險貨物分類或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、設計方和安裝方在出貨或安裝前應與合格當地專業人士核驗現行突尼西亞標準、進口、電網、消防、運輸及項目要求。

answer_first.en: For BESS exported from China to Tunisia, the public official sources reviewed did not identify one Tunisia-only mandatory product certificate specific to stationary lithium BESS. The practical gap is usually a project and import package: confirm INNORPI / customs treatment by HS code, provide IEC 62619:2022 and relevant IEC 62933 evidence where required by tender, authority, insurer, lender, or owner, obtain UN 38.3 transport evidence for lithium batteries, and close STEG / ANME grid, 50 Hz, and fire-safety requirements for the installation.
answer_first.zh: 中国BESS出口突尼斯时，已审阅的官方公开来源未识别到单独针对固定式锂电BESS的突尼斯强制产品证书。实际差距通常是项目和进口资料包：按HS编码确认INNORPI/海关处理，按招标、主管机关、保险方、贷款方或业主要求提供IEC 62619:2022及相关IEC 62933证据，为锂电池取得UN 38.3运输证据，并完成STEG/ANME并网、50Hz和消防安全要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國BESS出口突尼西亞時，已審閱的官方公開來源未識別到單獨針對固定式鋰電BESS的突尼西亞強制產品證書。實際差距通常是項目和進口資料包：按HS編碼確認INNORPI／海關處理，按招標、主管機關、保險方、貸款方或業主要求提供IEC 62619:2022及相關IEC 62933證據，為鋰電池取得UN 38.3運輸證據，並完成STEG／ANME併網、50Hz和消防安全要求。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, fire authority, grid operator, customs, dangerous-goods authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
